sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107970" key="u(perxeiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερχειρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">protectress,</tr_> a name of Hera in Laconia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:13:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
